name: toolbelt
description: Coding Toolbelt CLI — skill, hook, agent, and command management for AI coding agents

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target=bun --outdir bin --external onnxruntime-node --external fastembed --external '@anush008/tokenizers' --external '@huggingface/hub' --external 'tar' --external chromadb --external '@chroma-core/default-embed' --external sharp --external protobufjs && mv bin/index.js bin/toolbelt.bundle.js
scripts.install:local: bun run build && chmod +x bin/toolbelt && ln -sf $(pwd)/bin/toolbelt $HOME/.local/bin/toolbelt && echo 'Linked to ~/.local/bin/toolbelt'
